'''Rover''' was a group of three [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] in service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Transports Rover arrived in the [[Pakuuni/Legends|Pakuuni]] system in the final engagement between the Rebellion and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. Transports Rover attacked then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] Task force consisting of [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'', [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'', [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|System Patrol Craft]] [[Ranger (IPV-1 System Patrol Craft)|''Ranger'']], and various Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Combined efforts of Thrawn's forces inevitably destroyed Transports ''Rover''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
